text: Key growth drivers center on artificial intelligence integration across the company's product ecosystem and expanding cloud infrastructure demand. Analyst commentary highlights that AI and cloud momentum are critical factors in sustaining Alphabet's valuation, with cloud services closely monitored for AI-driven growth amid reemerging capital expenditure concerns among major technology companies. Revenue growth has been consistent, with Q4 2025 showing 11.29% year-over-year growth to $113.9 billion, following Q3 growth of 6.14% and Q2 growth of 6.86%. The company's Q4 2025 gross margin reached 59.82%, while operating margin stood at 31.61%, indicating strong profitability alongside top-line expansion.
